description_long: This is a futuristic, stylized handgun with a robust, angular design and a striking red and black color scheme. The body features a combination of matte and slightly glossy surfaces, with metallic panels and bolts accentuating the upper and rear sections. The barrel is short and thick, encased in a red shroud with black ribbed accents and metallic fasteners, giving it a reinforced, high-tech appearance. The grip is ergonomically shaped, predominantly black with a red accent, and appears to have a textured surface for improved handling. The trigger guard is large and angular, providing ample space and a modern aesthetic. Several metallic plates with visible screws and a circular muzzle at the front further enhance the weapon's industrial, sci-fi look.
description: A futuristic red and black handgun with a thick, reinforced barrel, metallic accents, and an ergonomic, textured grip. The design is angular and robust, featuring prominent bolts and a large trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the red and black ribbed barrel shroud, metallic panels, and the ergonomic grip with visible texturing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, angular barrel shroud, and the symmetrical, faceted design of the upper body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mirrored design of the barrel shroud, metallic fasteners, and the grip's contouring.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the barrel shroud, the ribbed top section, and the alignment of the grip and trigger guard.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a pronounced ergonomic curve, featuring a black base color with a red accent along the upper edge. Its surface appears textured, likely stippled or patterned for enhanced grip, and the lower section is slightly flared for stability. There are no visible logos or finger grooves, but the design suggests comfort and secure handling.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large, angular, and robust, with a squared-off lower edge and a thick profile. It lacks undercuts or integrated accessories but stands out due to its geometric, modern design and ample space for finger placement. The surface is smooth with no visible texturing or reinforcement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and thick, encased in a red shroud with black ribbed accents and metallic fasteners. It has a circular muzzle and a reinforced, high-tech appearance, with no visible threading, ports, or compensators. The exterior finish is matte with some metallic highlights.
attribute_slide_markings: There are metallic plates with visible screws on the upper rear section of the slide, but no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations are visible. The design is clean and industrial, with the metallic elements serving as both functional and decorative features.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is subtly flared and integrated into the grip, with a beveled edge for easier handling. It is black with a smooth finish and lacks finger rests, logos, or additional texturing, maintaining a streamlined and modern appearance.
